overall.description: A smooth first-person walkthrough of the 'Astral Lounge' nightclub from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vibrant purple and cyan neon lighting, dancing NPC crowds, and futuristic multi-level interior architecture. The camera moves steadily from the entrance sign toward the back of the venue.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub entrance with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the nightclub entrance, approaching the main dance floor area

notable_agents.action: dancing on the circular platform near the neon railings
walking across the dance floor toward the left side

entered.detail: large neon sign with 'ASTRAL LOUNGE' text in pink and blue lighting on the left wall
rectangular grid of glowing cyan and pink neon light fixtures covering the ceiling
multi-level circular platform with glowing cyan edge lighting and stairs
tall structural pillar illuminated with vertical cyan neon strips
dark polished floor reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance of the Astral Lounge nightclub, with the prominent neon sign visible on the left wall. The camera moves forward through the crowd toward the circular platform on the right, where NPCs dance near glowing railings. The ceiling features a striking grid of rectangular neon fixtures casting purple and cyan light across the reflective marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: central nightclub dance floor approaching rear exit

events.description: passing the entrance sign and moving deeper into the main lounge area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the crowd toward the rear archway of the lounge

notable_agents.action: dancing near the staircase railing on the left side

entered.detail: illuminated doorway at the back of the lounge with blue lighting
glass and metal railing of the upper level overlooking the dance floor
circular illuminated pattern on the floor with neon accents

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the lounge, the entrance sign falls behind as the camera approaches the rear archway. The circular platform is now closer on the right, and the ceiling neon grid dominates the upper frame. The floor features glowing circular patterns, and the crowd continues dancing as the camera advances toward the back exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide from the entrance of the Astral Lounge into the depths of its neon-lit interior. It begins by passing a prominent neon sign on the left wall, moving through a crowd toward a circular platform where NPCs dance beside glowing railings. As the camera advances, the reflective marble floor gives way to glowing circular patterns while the striking grid of purple and cyan ceiling fixtures becomes the dominant feature of the upper frame. The scene then shifts deeper into the venue, leaving the entrance behind as the camera approaches a rear archway. Finally, the movement culminates in a steady progression toward the back exit, with the vibrant lights and dancing crowds framing the path.
